controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks: voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks:
Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks: voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'amalgamated entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its business to another entity under
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Amalgamated Entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its
business to another entity under the scheme of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'amalgamated entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its business to another entity under

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Amalgamating Entity' means the entity which is to acquire the business
of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure the national company law tribunal constituted under section 408 of the companies act, 2013 (as defined in sub-section (90) of section 2 of the said ac
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Tribunal' means the National Company Law Tribunal constituted under
Section 408 of the Companies Act, 2013 (as defined in sub-section (90) of
Section 2 of the said Act), as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the national company law tribunal constituted under section 408 of the companies act, 2013 (as defined in sub-section (90) of section 2 of the said ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
<image>
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by the RBI, or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered under these directions: (1) two banks (2) a bank with a banking company (as defined under clause (c) of section 5 of banking regulation act
controls.control_description:
The undernoted cases of amalgamation shall be covered under these Directions:
(1) Two banks
(2) A bank with a banking company (as defined under clause (c) of Section 5
of Banking Regulation Act, 1949) excluding foreign banks or vice- versa.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered under these directions: (1) two banks (2) a bank with a banking company (as defined under clause (c) of section 5 of banking regulation act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by two-third majority of the total number of board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the amalgamating and the amalg
controls.control_description:
The decision of amalgamation shall be approved by two-third majority of the total
number of Board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the
amalgamating and the amalgamated banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by two-third majority of the total number of board members (not merely of those present and voting) of both the amalgamating and the amalg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that 'deeds of covenants', as indicated in reserve bank of india (local area banks - governance) directions, 2025, have been obtained from
controls.control_description:
Provided that, it shall be ensured that 'Deeds of Covenants', as indicated in
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025, have
been obtained from all independent and non-executive directors participating in
the said meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that 'deeds of covenants', as indicated in reserve bank of india (local area banks - governance) directions, 2025, have been obtained from

controls.control_objective: To ensure give particular consideration to the following matters: (1) whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the amalgamated entity
controls.control_description:
While giving approval, the Boards of the banks concerned shall give particular
consideration to the following matters:
(1) Whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the
amalgamated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give particular consideration to the following matters: (1) whether due diligence exercise has been undertaken in respect of the amalgamated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to the requirement stipulated in paragraph 8, also examine whether: (1) the nbfc has violated or is likely to violate any of the rbi / s
controls.control_description:
In case of amalgamation of an NBFC with a bank or vice versa, the Board of the
bank shall, in addition to the requirement stipulated in paragraph 8, also examine
whether:
(1) The NBFC has violated or is likely to violate any of the RBI / SEBI norms and
if so, the Board shall ensure that these norms are complied with before the
scheme of amalgamation is approved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to the requirement stipulated in paragraph 8, also examine whether: (1) the nbfc has violated or is likely to violate any of the rbi / s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the shareholders of the banks undergoing amalgamation by a resolution passed by a majority in number, representing two-thirds in value
controls.control_description:
The draft scheme of amalgamation, having been approved separately by the
Boards of Directors of each of the entities under amalgamation, in accordance
with paragraph 7 to paragraph 9, as applicable, shall be approved by the
shareholders of the banks undergoing amalgamation by a resolution passed by
a majority in number, representing two-thirds in value of the shareholders of the
said bank, present in person or by proxy at a meeting called for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the shareholders of the banks undergoing amalgamation by a resolution passed by a majority in number, representing two-thirds in value

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply when there is a poll to determine whether the resolution has been passed by required majority
controls.control_description:
Provided that the ceiling on voting rights under Section 12(2) of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949, shall apply when there is a poll to determine whether the
resolution has been passed by required majority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply when there is a poll to determine whether the resolution has been passed by required majority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities
controls.control_description:
The notices of every meeting of the shareholders called for approving the draft
scheme of amalgamation shall be published in newspapers at least once a week
for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the
locality or localities where the registered offices of the banks are situated, and
one of the newspapers shall be in a language commonly understood in the
locality or localities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi for approval or sanction, as applicable
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the scheme of amalgamation being approved by the requisite
majority of shareholders as specified under paragraph 10 of these Directions, it
shall be submitted to RBI for approval or sanction, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi for approval or sanction, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure require approval by the tribunal in terms of sections 230 to 234 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
Provided that for voluntary amalgamation of an NBFC with a bank or vice versa,
scheme of amalgamation shall require approval by the Tribunal in terms of
Sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require approval by the tribunal in terms of sections 230 to 234 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained before approaching any court or tribunal for approval of amalgamation of a bank and an nbfc
controls.control_description:
However, No-Objection
Certificate' from RBI shall be obtained before approaching any Court or Tribunal
for approval of amalgamation of a bank and an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained before approaching any court or tribunal for approval of amalgamation of a bank and an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, information and documents shall be submitted to RBI through
the PRAVAAH portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) as under:
(1) Amalgamation of two banks: The amalgamating and amalgamated banks
shall submit the information and documents in accordance with the
requirements specified in Annex.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the information and documents in accordance with annex, excluding item 4
controls.control_description:
(2) Amalgamation of an NBFC with a bank or vice versa: The bank shall submit
the information and documents in accordance with Annex, excluding item 4.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the information and documents in accordance with annex, excluding item 4

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final for all purposes
controls.control_description:
Such determination by the RBI of the value
of the shares shall be final for all purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final for all purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to, as the information relating to amalgamation and transfer of shares are price sensitive
controls.control_description:
In case of amalgamation of listed companies, SEBI regulations on Prohibition of
Insider Trading shall be adhered to, as the information relating to amalgamation
and transfer of shares are price sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to, as the information relating to amalgamation and transfer of shares are price sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in spirit and to the extent applicable
controls.control_description:
Even in cases of amalgamation of
unlisted companies, the SEBI regulations and guidelines should be followed in
spirit and to the extent applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in spirit and to the extent applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be <image> given separately in respect of each valuer, and it may be indicated how the final swap ratio is arrived at
controls.control_description:
(9) if there are more than one valuer, whether each of the valuers have
recommended a different swap ratio and if so, the above details shall be
<image>
given separately in respect of each valuer, and it may be indicated how the
final swap ratio is arrived at.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be <image> given separately in respect of each valuer, and it may be indicated how the final swap ratio is arrived at

controls.control_objective: To ensure require
controls.control_description: Such other information and documents as RBI may require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require
